summary: Completed testing of iteration 8 features: Free platform, Telegram integration, city field, mobile menu. All features implemented correctly and working.
passed_tests: ✅ Mobile menu displays all 8 required links: Проекти, Фирми, Калкулатор, Услуги, Професии, Блог, Цени по области, За нас
✅ Logo with 'Ремонт и строителство' subtitle visible and centered on desktop
✅ Registration form includes 'Град / Населено място' field for both client and company
✅ Registration form for companies shows Telegram info box with blue background
✅ Registration form for companies has telegram_username field with placeholder
✅ Registration form shows 'Платформата е БЕЗПЛАТНА за ограничен период!' green banner
✅ Project detail page shows green 'Платформата е безплатна!' notice
✅ Project detail page shows 'Контактите са отключени' with client info visible
✅ Project detail page has NO Stripe payment buttons (free platform)
✅ Calculator page has NO paywall dialog
✅ Calculator page has NO usage limit counter
✅ Calculator PDF download button available without payment
✅ Company dashboard shows 'Платформата е безплатна!' green banner
✅ Company dashboard shows Telegram link section with t.me/TemaDomBot button
✅ API /api/projects returns contact_locked=false for all projects
✅ API /api/projects/<id> returns contact_locked=false and shows client_name, client_email, client_phone
✅ API /api/auth/register accepts city and telegram_username fields
✅ API /api/auth/me returns city and telegram_username
✅ API /api/messages allows sending messages with contact info (no filtering)
✅ API /api/telegram/webhook endpoint available
✅ API /api/telegram/link endpoint functional
✅ API /api/calculator/log-use returns allowed=true (unlimited)
✅ API /api/calculator/status returns unlimited=true
seed_data_creation: Created test users with city and telegram_username fields during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 fully tested. Platform is now FREE - all payment gates disabled. Mobile menu fixed with all 8 links. Registration has city and telegram_username fields. Chat messages are not filtered. Telegram bot integration working (bot token: 8799080474:AAHcnu93WuzSdDzEYQd5N_7MCfminVDlRUI). Test credentials: company testfirma@test.bg / test12345, client ivan_client@test.bg / test12345.
